testcase.name: test_channel_performance_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_channel_performance.py:44: in test_channel_performance_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
